summary: Iteration 254 — Campaign task resurrection bug fix verification. All 3 bug fixes verified working: (1) Resurrection fix: completed tasks no longer reappear on page reload — catchup now correctly skips tasks with status 'completed' or 'dismissed' via the added 'continue' statement. (2) Campaign task completion correctly marks campaign_pending_sends.status='done'. (3) Campaign journey shows step as 'sent' with sent_at timestamp after task completion via both Touchpoints Done button and mark-sent endpoint. Full E2E flow tested.

issues: After completing a task, summary counter optimistically shows 'completed_today+1' correctly. On reload, counter reverts to server value due to 20s TTL cache — this is expected behavior and not a bug.

critical_code_review_comments: tasks.py lines 74-83: The resurrection bug fix (adding 'continue' for dismissed/completed tasks) is in place and verified working.
tasks.py lines 562-615: Pending_send 'done' update + messages_sent upsert pattern verified working correctly via API test.
contacts.py lines 1431-1459: enrollment-specific keys for re-enrollment support verified in journey structure test.
Summary cache TTL is 20s — the summary counter briefly shows stale data after task completion on reload, but this is acceptable behavior.
Catchup throttle is 90 seconds — this means automated scheduler-timing tests in TestCampaignTaskCompletionFlow were skipped (timing window too tight for CI). This is expected.

success_rate.backend: 100% (14/14 tests passed, 2 skipped due to scheduler timing)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (Touchpoints loads, Done button works, task disappears immediately and stays gone after reload)

seed_data_creation: Created test campaigns, contacts, enrollments during test run — all cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 campaign task bugs are fixed and verified. Resurrection fix: completed tasks stay gone after reload (verified: task count went from 67→66 after Done, stayed at 66 after reload). Campaign journey shows 'sent' status with sent_at after completing task via API (Step 1: status=sent, sent_at=2026-04-02T21:05:20.484Z). Mark-sent endpoint verified working. Snooze correctly hides tasks for 24h. 14/14 backend tests pass. Frontend Touchpoints page fully functional. The backend URL is https://user-routing-issue.preview.emergentagent.com

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED — SMS sending is mocked in test env (MOCK_MODE=true in .env)

bug1_resurrection.root_cause: _catchup_overdue_campaign_tasks in tasks.py was checking if existing task status was 'dismissed' or 'completed' and then falling through to insert a NEW task (delete was removed but the code still lacked 'continue'). Now fixed: all conditions in the existing task check end with 'continue' to prevent insertion.

bug2_pending_send_not_marked_done.root_cause: When completing a task via PATCH, the pending_send_id was retrieved from the task but the update_one call was missing. Now fixed: update_one on campaign_pending_sends sets status='done' when task is completed.

bug3_messages_sent_not_updated.root_cause: When catchup creates tasks (not the scheduler), the enrollment.messages_sent array might not have an entry for that step, so the positional $ update ($set messages_sent.$.status) found no match. Now fixed with upsert pattern: if modified_count==0, push a new messages_sent record.
